offer: For law firms processing 5–15 filings/month, compliance errors cause legal penalties. We automate documentation instead of manual documentation processes.
problem: Inaccurate or late compliance documentation can lead to legal penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance workflows
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Participate in forums where law firms share tools
try_it: Let users try template generation for common filings and document review
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
